issue_title: Unable to open emails with Control + Click or Right Click (UPDATED)
issue_body_preview:
### Your environment

Firefox on Linux.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Go to your email listing
2. Try to open an email in a new window or tab
3. The email will always open in the current tab

### Expected behavior

I'm able to open many emails quickly.

### Actual behavior

The workflo
test_description_zh: 在邮件列表页面中，使用 Ctrl+Click 或右键点击邮件链接，观察邮件是否能在新标签页/新窗口中打开。
expected_result_zh: 使用 Ctrl+Click 点击邮件时，邮件应在浏览器新标签页中打开；右键点击邮件时，应出现浏览器原生右键菜单，允许用户选择在新标签页或新窗口中打开邮件，而不是始终在当前标签页中打开。
